action_derivative_identity: G and H are respectively third and fourth derivatives of the same parent action
claim_boundary: v6.0.4 proves linear phase no-selection and finds one exact round-S7 octave commensurability, but the accepted parent family does not supply the selected nonlinear field, coefficient, stable coherent solution, or negative invariant sigma-Hessian shift needed for physicality selection.

cubic.formula: G_mnp=U'''(0) integral_M dmu f_m f_n f_p plus derivative terms
cubic.permutation: fully symmetric for nondifferentiated real-scalar potential

derivative_interactions: not present in the minimal constant-Z scalar truncation; possible only from declared field-dependent kinetic terms

quartic.formula: H_mnpq=G_0 integral_M dmu f_m f_n f_p f_q plus declared derivative interactions
quartic.permutation: fully symmetric for nondifferentiated real-scalar potential
